note: Generic, config-driven tax-rebate deals. Unlike data/tax/deals.json (Ireland-only, keyed by host country code), a deal here fully specifies BOTH sides: a homeCountry (whose citizens' factories are scanned) and a hostCountry/coverage (which of those factories count). Add a deal by adding an entry here — no code changes required. Each deal logs independently once/day via deal_log.py into data/tax/deal_logs/<id>.json. Deals submitted via the dashboard's 'Propose a deal' form (.github/workflows/deal-config-submit.yml) are auto-enabled once the host country's password checks out — there is no manual-review step; `enabled: false` only exists for a deal a human wants to pause/retire without deleting it. There is no per-deal password here — viewing is gated by the host country's shared password in data/tax/partner_access.json instead, so one password unlocks every deal for that country.
